calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Jan-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner, Steven Keith Schur, is present in propria persona.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name and Gender. Steven Keith Schur is sworn and examined by the Court. The Court received the Medical Certification under penalty of perjury by Dr. Chettawut Tulayaphanich M.D. and is ordered filed.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the proposed change of gender and change of gender, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: STEFANIE KARENA SCHUR and change of Gender from Male to FEMALE. Decree for Change of Name and Gender is submitted and signed in open court.
